info.name: USER Copy
info.description:
## User Authentication API

This collection handles **end-user authentication** for the application. It provides the complete session lifecycle — registration, login, and logout — for regular users interacting with the platform, routed through the local backend at `http://localhost:3000`.

### Endpoints

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| `POST` | `/api/auth/user/register` | Register a new user account |
| `POST` | `/api/auth/user/login` | Log in with existing credentials |
| `GET` | `/api/auth/user/logout` | Log out the current session |

### Usage

Start with the **Register** request to create a new user account. Use the **Login** request to authenticate and begin a session. When done, call the **Logout** request to end the session securely.

### Base URL

```
http://localhost:3000
```

request.description:
Registers a new end-user account in the application.

**Method:** `POST`
**Endpoint:** `/api/auth/user/register`

Send a JSON body with the user's details (e.g. name, email, password). Returns the created user profile on success.

Authenticates an existing user and initiates a session.

**Method:** `POST`
**Endpoint:** `/api/auth/user/login`

Send a JSON body with the user's email and password. Returns a session token or cookie on successful authentication.

Terminates the current user session.

**Method:** `GET`
**Endpoint:** `/api/auth/user/logout`

No request body required. Clears the active session token or cookie and returns a confirmation response.
